All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

T

tablero - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
The current Sudoku board (model).
tablero - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ProveedorAyuda
The board this provider analyzes.
tablero - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ValidadorSudoku
The board to validate.
TableroSudoku - Class in com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model
Represents the complete 6x6 Sudoku board.
TableroSudoku() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Constructs a new empty Sudoku board.
tieneError - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Indicates whether the cell currently violates a Sudoku rule.
tieneError() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Checks whether this cell currently violates a Sudoku rule.
TITULO_VENTANA - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.Main
Title shown in the application's title bar.
toString() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Returns a human-readable representation of this cell, useful for debugging and console testing.
toString() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Returns a human-readable representation of the board, useful for debugging and console testing.
TOTAL_BLOQUES - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Total number of blocks in the board (6 blocks of 2x3).
TOTAL_COLUMNAS - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Total number of columns in the board.
TOTAL_FILAS - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Total number of rows in the board.
